ideation: This animation sequence depicts a robot carefully holding a mahjong red dragon tile.  The robot's movements will be slow and deliberate, reflecting the careful handling required for such a tile.  The sequence focuses on the precision of the movements, conveying a sense of respect for the game and the tile itself. The final frame emphasizes the robot's focus and reverence for the tile. Frame 1 begins with the arms slightly extended outward and slightly upward, palms facing each other as if preparing to receive the tile. Frames 2 and 3 show the tile being carefully received. The arms move inward, and the wrists tilt downward to cradle the tile. Frame 4 shows the robot holding the tile securely, with the arms slightly more inward and the wrists at a precise angle to keep the tile safe and at a proper position for viewing. Frame 5 shows the arms remaining in a position of careful holding. The robot remains in this position to show the importance of the tile.

frames.beat: arms extend slightly, palms ready to receive
arms move inward, wrists tilt to cradle the tile
arms continue inward, cradling the tile gently
arms hold the tile securely, wrists angled precisely
arms remain still, reverently holding the red dragon
